summary.en: Two-factor authentication (2FA) platform that lets developers add strong, app-based security to websites and apps.
summary.zh: 雙因素驗證（2FA）平台，讓開發者為網站與應用程式加入強固的 App 式安全防護。

highlight.en: An early YC security success, Authy was acquired by Twilio in February 2015 and became its core authentication product. It had protected users across 6,000+ sites including Coinbase and Cloudflare before the deal.
highlight.zh: Authy 是 YC 早期的資安成功案例，2015 年 2 月被 Twilio 收購並成為其核心驗證產品。收購前已為 Coinbase、Cloudflare 等逾 6,000 個網站的使用者提供保護。

funding.en: Raised ~$3.8M before being acquired by Twilio (2015, terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 被 Twilio 收購前募得約 380 萬美元（2015 年，金額未公開）

sources.title: Twilio Acquires Two-Factor Authentication Service Authy | TechCrunch

summary.en: On-demand mobile car repair service that sends certified mechanics to a customer's home or office.
summary.zh: 隨叫隨到的行動汽車維修服務，派遣合格技師到顧客的住家或辦公室提供服務。

highlight.en: A YC W12 marketplace that pioneered transparent, doorstep auto repair across major US metros. Backed by a16z, SoftBank and Ashton Kutcher, it raised over $32M before being acquired by Seattle-based Wrench in June 2022.
highlight.zh: YC W12 的媒合平台，率先在美國各大都會推動透明、到府的汽車維修服務。獲 a16z、軟銀與 Ashton Kutcher 投資，募得逾 3,200 萬美元，2022 年 6 月被西雅圖的 Wrench 收購。

funding.en: Raised >$32M; acquired by Wrench in 2022 (terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 募得逾 3,200 萬美元；2022 年被 Wrench 收購（金額未公開）

summary.en: Online search engine for commercial office space, with rich photography and listing data across US markets.
summary.zh: 商用辦公空間的線上搜尋引擎，提供涵蓋美國各市場的高品質照片與物件資料。

highlight.en: A YC W12 proptech that built a free, transparent database covering over 10 billion square feet of office space. It was acquired by flexible-office company Knotel in July 2018, with its 70-person team joining to power Knotel's real estate data platform.
highlight.zh: YC W12 的房地產科技公司，打造涵蓋逾 100 億平方英尺辦公空間的免費透明資料庫。2018 年 7 月被彈性辦公空間公司 Knotel 收購，70 人團隊加入並支撐其房地產資料平台。

funding.zh: 2018 年被 Knotel 收購（金額未公開）

summary.en: On-demand smartphone repair network whose certified technicians fix devices at the customer's chosen location.
summary.zh: 隨叫隨到的智慧型手機維修網路，由合格技師在顧客指定地點修復裝置。

highlight.en: Started in a UC Santa Barbara dorm, iCracked grew into a multinational repair network spanning several countries with thousands of technicians. It was acquired in 2019 by SquareTrade, the Allstate-owned protection-plan company.
highlight.zh: 起步於加州大學聖塔芭芭拉分校的宿舍，iCracked 發展為橫跨多國、擁有數千名技師的跨國維修網路。2019 年被 Allstate 旗下的保固服務公司 SquareTrade 收購。

funding.zh: 2019 年被 SquareTrade（Allstate 旗下）收購（金額未公開）

sources.title: Allstate Buys iCracked, an On-Demand Repair Service - Carrier Management

summary.en: Business SMS platform for sending and managing text, voice and voicemail communications at scale.
summary.zh: 企業簡訊平台，可大規模傳送與管理文字、語音及語音信箱通訊。

highlight.en: A YC W12 startup that began as a messaging tool for a teacher and grew into a business SMS service backed by Menlo Ventures and 500 Startups. It was acquired by IT services firm Cameo Global in June 2016.
highlight.zh: YC W12 的新創公司，最初是給老師用的訊息工具，後發展為由 Menlo Ventures 與 500 Startups 投資的企業簡訊服務。2016 年 6 月被 IT 服務公司 Cameo Global 收購。

funding.en: Raised a $3M Series A; acquired by Cameo Global in 2016
funding.zh: 募得 300 萬美元 A 輪；2016 年被 Cameo Global 收購

founders: Ash Rust, Garrett Johnson, Ryan Pfeffer, John Fallone

sources.title: SendHub has been acquired by Cameo Global

summary.en: Mobile group-payments and crowdfunding service that let communities pool, collect and fundraise money online.
summary.zh: 行動群組付款與群眾募資服務，讓社群在線上集資、收款與募款。

highlight.en: Originally Crowdtilt out of YC W12, Tilt raised from a16z and hit a reported $400M valuation in 2015. It was acquired by Airbnb for around $12M in an acqui-hire in 2017, with its team joining Airbnb's group-travel efforts.
highlight.zh: 前身為 YC W12 的 Crowdtilt，Tilt 獲 a16z 投資，2015 年估值一度傳達 4 億美元。2017 年以約 1,200 萬美元被 Airbnb 以人才收購方式買下，團隊加入 Airbnb 的群組旅遊業務。

funding.en: Peaked at a reported ~$400M valuation in 2015; acquired by Airbnb for ~$12M in 2017
funding.zh: 2015 年估值一度傳達約 4 億美元；2017 年以約 1,200 萬美元被 Airbnb 收購

sources.title: Airbnb finalizes deal to buy social payments startup Tilt | TechCrunch

summary.en: SaaS platform consolidating employee rewards, recognition and corporate perks for HR teams.
summary.zh: 整合員工獎勵、表揚與企業福利的 SaaS 平台，服務 HR 團隊。

highlight.en: A YC W12 HR-tech company serving enterprises such as Salesforce and Weight Watchers. It was acquired in March 2023 by UK-based employee-engagement firm Reward Gateway to strengthen its rewards-and-recognition offering.
highlight.zh: YC W12 的 HR 科技公司，服務 Salesforce、Weight Watchers 等企業客戶。2023 年 3 月被英國員工敬業度公司 Reward Gateway 收購，以強化其獎勵與表揚產品線。

funding.en: Acquired by Reward Gateway in 2023 (terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 2023 年被 Reward Gateway 收購（金額未公開）

founders: Taro Fukuyama, Atsuhiro Takahashi, Sunny Tsang

sources.title: Reward Gateway Acquires Fond to Strengthen R&R Offering

summary.en: Crypto exchange and wallet where consumers and merchants buy, sell, store and transact in digital currencies.
summary.zh: 加密貨幣交易所與錢包，讓消費者與商家買賣、儲存並交易數位貨幣。

highlight.en: The most valuable YC fintech, Coinbase went public via a direct Nasdaq listing in April 2021 (peaking near $85B). As of June 2026 it trades on Nasdaq (COIN) with a market cap of roughly $40B.
highlight.zh: Coinbase 是 YC 最具價值的金融科技公司，2021 年 4 月以直接上市方式登上 Nasdaq（峰值近 850 億美元）。截至 2026 年 6 月在 Nasdaq（COIN）交易，市值約 400 億美元。

funding.en: Public on Nasdaq (COIN); market cap ~$40B as of June 2026
funding.zh: 於 Nasdaq 上市（COIN）；2026 年 6 月市值約 400 億美元

summary.en: North America's leading online grocery marketplace, offering same-day delivery and pickup from 1,400+ retail banners.
summary.zh: 北美領先的線上雜貨市集，提供當日外送與自取，合作零售品牌逾 1,400 個。

highlight.en: A defining YC S12 consumer marketplace, Instacart IPO'd on Nasdaq (CART) in September 2023 at a ~$9.9B valuation. Co-founder Apoorva Mehta exited the board with a fortune reported around $1.1-1.3B.
highlight.zh: Instacart 是 YC S12 的標誌性消費市集，2023 年 9 月以約 99 億美元估值在 Nasdaq（CART）上市。共同創辦人 Apoorva Mehta 卸任董事時，身價傳達約 11 至 13 億美元。

funding.en: IPO'd on Nasdaq (CART) in 2023 at ~$9.9B valuation; peaked at ~$39B private valuation in 2021
funding.zh: 2023 年於 Nasdaq（CART）上市，估值約 99 億美元；2021 年私募估值峰值約 390 億美元

founders: Apoorva Mehta, Brandon Leonardo, Maxwell Mullen

sources.title: Instacart's founder is worth $1.3 billion after IPO - Fortune

summary.en: Cloud R&D platform giving life-sciences teams modern software to design experiments and manage biotech data.
summary.zh: 雲端研發平台，為生命科學團隊提供現代化軟體，用於設計實驗與管理生技資料。

highlight.en: A standout YC S12 enterprise SaaS, Benchling powers R&D for biotech leaders like Regeneron, Eli Lilly and Sanofi. It was valued at $6.1B in a 2021 round led by Franklin Templeton and Altimeter.
highlight.zh: Benchling 是 YC S12 出色的企業 SaaS，為 Regeneron、Eli Lilly、Sanofi 等生技龍頭提供研發動能。2021 年由 Franklin Templeton 與 Altimeter 領投的募資中估值達 61 億美元。

funding.zh: 最近估值約 61 億美元（2021 年）；累計募得逾 4 億美元

sources.title: Benchling Valued at $6.1 Billion in New Funding - Lead Edge

summary.en: No-code workflow automation platform connecting thousands of work apps so users can automate repetitive tasks.
summary.zh: 無程式碼工作流程自動化平台，串接數千個工作應用程式，讓使用者自動化重複性任務。

highlight.en: A famously capital-efficient YC S12 company, Zapier scaled to a $5B valuation (2021) on just ~$1.4M of venture funding, reaching profitability within three years. It now connects more than 6,000 apps.
highlight.zh: Zapier 是 YC S12 以資本效率聞名的公司，僅靠約 140 萬美元創投資金便在 2021 年達到 50 億美元估值，並在三年內轉虧為盈。如今串接逾 6,000 個應用程式。

funding.en: Valued at ~$5B in 2021; raised only ~$1.4M of venture capital
funding.zh: 2021 年估值約 50 億美元；僅募得約 140 萬美元創投資金

founders: Wade Foster, Bryan Helmig, Mike Knoop

sources.title: Wade Foster built Zapier to $5 billion in valuation with just $1.4 million in VC - Founders Network

summary.en: Talent acquisition suite combining an applicant tracking system (ATS) with candidate CRM and analytics.
summary.zh: 人才招募套件，整合應徵者追蹤系統（ATS）、人才 CRM 與分析工具。

highlight.en: A leading YC S12 recruiting-software brand used by Netflix, Spotify and over 5,000 companies, Lever raised $123M before exiting. It was acquired by talent-acquisition group Employ in August 2022.
highlight.zh: Lever 是 YC S12 領先的招募軟體品牌，客戶包含 Netflix、Spotify 等逾 5,000 家公司，退場前募得 1.23 億美元。2022 年 8 月被人才招募集團 Employ 收購。

funding.en: Raised $123M; acquired by Employ in 2022 (terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 募得 1.23 億美元；2022 年被 Employ 收購（金額未公開）

founders: Sarah Nahm, Nate Smith, Randal Truong, Brian Noguchi

sources.title: Lever Joins Employ to Accelerate Growth - Business Wire
